creator: root@cloud.rain.com
text:
When pressing "escape" on System Console Screenmap window in the post-install
configuration, the system panics with "panic: Going nowhere without my init!"

Fix: 

Work around by not pressing escape!   (-:
I don't know a fix offhand.
How-To-Repeat: Get to the screenmap window, press escape.  I encountered this problem during
the automatic post-install invocation after doing a quick install.
